description: Natural-language chat panel that sends queries to the Agent backend and renders tool-call results directly on the map.

descriptionFull.title: Chat with the MMGIS Agent to list layers, toggle visibility, adjust opacity, zoom to features, run analysis, and more — all via natural language.

example.separatedTool: (bool) If true, this tool lives outside the left-hand toolbar and is independently accessible [default true]

name: AgentChat

components.name: Separated Tool
components.description: If true, this tool will live outside the left-hand toolbar and be independently accessible.

components.name: Justification
components.description: The panel will display on the right side of the screen if set to right, otherwise defaults to the left side.

components.name: Agent API URL
components.description: Base URL for the Agent backend API (e.g., https://example.com/api/agent). Required for tool to function.

author: yunks128
